emails.subject: Thank you for booking your assessment slot.
emails.content:
Thank you for booking your assessment slot.We’re pleased to confirm your slot for 9:30 AM, 8 Feb 2026.


Please look out for a separate assessment invitation email, which will contain your unique test link and further instructions.


If you have any questions, please reach out to support@hirepro.in.


Wishing you all the best for your assessment!


Sincerely,

Talent acquisition team
Deloitte US-India Officesloitte US-India Offices | National Level Assessment (NLA) | Assessment slot confirmation
